---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Personal projects — Erika C. Freeman"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.section-label}
Personal projects
:::
::: {.section-title}
off the clock
:::

The things I make and chase when I'm not at the bench.

::: {.projects-grid}

::: {.project-card}
::: {.project-figure}
![](assets/projects/outside.jpg)
:::
::: {.project-body}
::: {.project-title}
[Adventure](adventure.html)
:::
::: {.project-desc}
Running, climbing, and the great out-the-door, currently training toward a sub-3:30 marathon. [Read the logs →](adventure.html)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.project-figure}
Travel
:::
::: {.project-body}
::: {.project-title}
[Travel](travel.html)
:::
::: {.project-desc}
Field trips, conferences, and a deep love of Argentina. [See the logs →](travel.html)
:::
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.project-figure}
![](assets/projects/citrus.svg)
:::
::: {.project-body}
::: {.project-title}
[Table of Contents](dinners.html)
:::
::: {.project-desc}
A themed dinner series with Juli. CITR·US is the citrus strand. [See the editions →](dinners.html)
:::
:::
:::

:::

::: {.personal-link}
[← Back to projects](projects.html)
:::
